sections.paragraph:
f. (from the root זָמַם).-

(1) counsel, Job 42:2 especially that which is evil or pernicious, Psa 10:2 21:12 37:7 Jer 23:20 also a thought, Psa 10:4.

(2) i.q. דַּעַת מְזִמֹּות ( Pro 8:12), counsel, prudence, craftiness, Pro 1:4 3:21 5:2 8:12 and in s bad sense, the devising of snares, malice; whence אִישׁ מְזִמֹּות a fraudulent man, Pro 12:2 14:17 בַּעַל מְזִמֹּות id. 24:8 .

(3) wickedness, Job 21:27 Psa 139:20.
